actions.value:
Please also be aware that you can completely avoid any kind of holds on funds by selecting a DEX (decentralized exchange) service within the Exchange tool of Edge.

 

Once you have selected the source and destination wallet, and built your swap quote, you will notice a small tile that indicates "Powered by..." and you may tap on this to change the exchange service to decentralized and such an order routing would not allow for any discrimination on funds received, since it will be facilitated by a smart contract, instead of a centralized swap service.
